title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 2: The Taming of Enkidu
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 2 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Enkidu is civilized through love, learns the arts of man, and becomes Gilgamesh's companion.
introduction: Tablet 2 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: Enkidu is civilized through love, learns the arts of man, and becomes Gilgamesh's companion.

translation.text: Enkidu was diminished, he could not run as before. But he had gained understanding; his mind was wide, his heart was deep.
